name: 22q11_22_LCR22_D_E_distal
description: 22q11.22 distal deletion/duplication, mediated by NAHR between LCR22-D and LCR22-E (or LCR22-F). Distal nested 22q11.2 CNVs (~1.0-1.5 Mb) telomeric to the canonical DiGeorge 3 Mb region. Phenotype: milder ID, growth retardation, behavioral issues; some patients have classic DiGeorge-like features. Critical genes: MAPK1, CRKL (already in DiGeorge core for A-D), HIC2, SMARCB1 (more telomeric).

architecture.internal_structure: LCR22-D, -E, -F SD blocks of ~100-300 kb each at >97% identity (USP18/BCR/GGT paralog cassettes); unique core contains MAPK1, PPIL2, YPEL1, MAPK1, PPM1F. Distinct from the canonical proximal LCR22A-D DiGeorge region but architecturally continuous.
